tools.name: search_community_apps
tools.description: Product data tool: search and browse the Mana community's published iPhone creations (games, tools, utilities created by users). Returns app titles, handles, creators, slugs, and pagination info.

tools.name: get_popular_tags
tools.description: Product data tool: list the popular tags used to categorise Mana community creations, with frequency counts.

tools.name: get_public_share
tools.description: Product data tool: fetch either a Mana creator's public profile or one published Mana creation by handle and optional slug.
